title: Simple Economy
description: This mod add a economy to your world!
body:
Simple Economy
Simple Economy adds a lightweight, server-friendly economy system for Minecraft (NeoForge) focused on trading blocks and simple player payments. It’s designed for multiplayer servers: minimal setup, intuitive UI, and no complex admin panels required.

Highlights
Player balances with coin-style gameplay support
Player Market block (shops players can stock and price)
Server Market mode (infinite stock, admin-managed pricing)
Payment Button block (quick “pay” interactions)
Sell Chest (drop items in, sell all instantly using a price list)
Features
Market (Shop Block)
A placeable shop block with a built-in UI:

Player shop: the owner sets prices and stocks items in the internal storage
Server shop: infinite stock (no storage consumption), perfect for server-run shops
Break protection for server shops (restricted to ops)
Server shop quality-of-life

Operators can buy from server shops normally
Operators can sneak (shift) while opening to access owner controls (price editing)
Payment Button
A configurable “pay action” block for quick transactions:

Choose a target player (or the server)
Set an amount and a custom label
Useful for:
donations
entry fees
simple services (“Pay 10 coins to enter”, etc.)
Sell Chest
A fast, no-nonsense selling block:

Put items inside
Press Sell to sell everything with a configured price list
Shows a total preview in the GUI
Plays a sound on successful sale
Configuration
Sell prices are controlled via a JSON price list (example file included in the project).
Intended to be easy to tweak for your server economy.
Compatibility
Minecraft: 1.21.1
Loader: NeoForge
Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
Recommended for servers
License
MIT

Notes / Tips for Server Owners
Use server shop mode for admin stores (infinite supply).
Use player shops for a player-driven economy.
Keep Sell Chest prices balanced to avoid inflation.
